summary: Comprehensive testing of 80% usage alert notifications and auto-recharge features. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified - notification bell with badge, notification dropdown, auto-recharge toggle, and recharge pack selection cards.

issues: Chart component shows width/height warning (-1) - cosmetic console warning only, does not affect functionality

test_credentials.stripe_user: Created dynamically with stripe_customer_id for auto-recharge testing

seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification and auto-recharge features fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/notifications (with unread_count), PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read, POST /api/notifications/read-all, GET /api/billing/recharge-packs (3 packs), GET /api/billing/settings (auto_recharge_enabled, recharge_pack_id, has_payment_method), PUT /api/billing/settings (validates pack_id, requires payment method). Frontend notification bell shows unread badge, dropdown displays notifications with title/message/timestamp. Auto-recharge toggle enables/disables correctly, pack selection cards (small/medium/large) display with correct prices.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/billing/recharge-packs - ✅ Correct structure (pack_id, name, credits, price)
GET /api/billing/settings - ✅ User with stripe_customer_id has has_payment_method=true
GET /api/billing/settings - ✅ User without stripe_customer_id has has_payment_method=false
PUT /api/billing/settings - ✅ Requires payment method to enable auto-recharge (400)
PUT /api/billing/settings - ✅ Can enable with payment method
PUT /api/billing/settings - ✅ Validates all pack_ids (small, medium, large)
GET /api/notifications - ✅ Returns notifications list and unread_count
POST /api/notifications/read-all - ✅ Returns count of marked notifications
80% usage alert - ✅ Creates notification when usage >= 80%
Auto-recharge - ✅ Fails gracefully without Stripe customer (returns 402)
Notification workflow - ✅ Full create/list/mark-read/mark-all-read flow works
frontend_ui_tests: Notification bell - ✅ Visible in desktop header with data-testid='notification-bell'
Notification badge - ✅ Shows unread count (tested with 2 notifications)
Notification dropdown - ✅ Opens on click with data-testid='notification-dropdown'
Notification content - ✅ Shows title, message, timestamp for each notification
Usage alert notification - ✅ 'Credit usage at 80%' displayed correctly
Auto-recharge toggle - ✅ Clickable and enables/disables correctly
Recharge pack options - ✅ Displayed after enabling with data-testid='recharge-pack-options'
Small pack card - ✅ Shows $15 / 5,000 credits with data-testid='recharge-pack-small'
Medium pack card - ✅ Shows $40 / 15,000 credits with data-testid='recharge-pack-medium'
Large pack card - ✅ Shows $100 / 50,000 credits with data-testid='recharge-pack-large'
Pack selection - ✅ Selected pack highlighted with border
Toast notification - ✅ 'Auto-recharge enabled' toast appears on toggle
Plan cards - ✅ All 5 plans displayed (Free, Starter, Growth, Scale, Enterprise)
Current plan - ✅ Shows 'Starter' for test user
Credits remaining - ✅ Shows 8,000 in header and billing page

billing_settings_validation: Requires payment method (stripe_customer_id) to enable auto-recharge (400)
Accepts all valid pack_ids: small, medium, large
usage_alert_logic: Only one alert per billing period (checks period_start)

stripe_integration_notes: Auto-recharge Stripe charge will fail in testing without real payment method - tested validation paths only. Error handling creates 'auto_recharge_failed' notification.
